title: BEM-843 continue triad
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
created='2026-05-25 | 12:55 (UTC+3)'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def files(g): return [str(p) for p in sorted(Path('.').glob(g)) if p.is_file()]
results=files('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/*.status.json')
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
responses=files('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/*')
missing=[]
if not results: missing.append('workflow_dispatch_results')
if not (runtime.get('started_at') or runtime.get('completed_at')): missing.append('claude_runtime_state')
if not responses: missing.append('claude_to_gpt_response_files')
status='triad_present_or_response_files_exist' if not missing else 'triad_missing_'+missing[0]
state={'bem':'BEM-843','status':status,'missing':missing,'dispatch_results':results[-10:],'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'response_files':responses[-10:],'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem843_continue_claude_proof_triad.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem843_continue_claude_proof_triad.md').write_text('# BEM-843 | Continue Claude Proof Triad | '+status+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md').write_text('Next: repair first missing proof '+(missing[0] if missing else 'process response')+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-843'+sep+'Status: '+status+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem843_continue_claude_proof_triad.json','governance/reports/bem843_continue_claude_proof_triad.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Continued proof triad verification after installing AGENT_CONTEXT')
"""
No issue comments.
